description: Refactor IntentMail to support multiple render targets (Terminal, Discord, Web) through a shared component architecture. This is the foundation that enables DUI and future surfaces.

title: S8.3: Rules engine E2E tests
description: End-to-end tests for rules: parsing, validation, evaluation, dry-run, audit, rollback.
notes: KEEP OPEN: The testing-sop cluster adds a coverage floor and CI gates but the rules engine tests are unit-level vitest, not the full end-to-end parse→validate→evaluate→dry-run→audit→rollback flow described here. A unit-test bump shipped, but full E2E scenario coverage is still absent. This bead remains valid and open.
close_reason: Rules-engine E2E suite shipped — 28 tests (create→apply→audit→rollback, all action types + operators), coverage 68.95%→71.4%. PR #64.

title: S8.2: MCP tool unit tests
description: Unit tests for all 24 MCP tools with mocked providers. Verify input validation, error handling, output schemas.
close_reason: Commits d5485e6, 42f3601, bc00033 (testing-sop cluster) delivered MCP tool unit tests for all new tools (mail_action, mail_daily_digest, etc.) plus wired the vitest coverage gate. The original description called for 'unit tests for all 24 MCP tools with mocked providers' — the testing-sop work plus prior shipped commits collectively satisfy this with mocked providers throughout (real API integration explicitly deferred). 192+ tests green.

title: S8.1: Gmail integration tests
description: Integration tests against real Gmail API using sandbox/test account. Test OAuth flow, sync, search, send.
notes: KEEP OPEN: The testing-sop cluster (/implement-tests pass) uses mocks throughout — not a real Gmail API sandbox. The original scope requires integration tests against a real Gmail API with real OAuth flow. No such tests were written; real-API fixtures were explicitly out of scope. This bead remains valid and open.
close_reason: Gated Gmail/Outlook live-integration harness shipped — runs real auth/list/flag round-trips when creds present, skips cleanly in CI. PR #65.

title: E8: Test Coverage
description: Integration and E2E tests for Gmail connector, MCP tools, and web dashboard
close_reason: All children resolved: MCP tool tests (.2), rules E2E (.3), Gmail integration harness (.1) done; web E2E (.4) won't-fix (Playwright removed).

title: S7.3: Multi-account sync orchestration
description: Coordinate sync across multiple Gmail accounts. Handle rate limits, prioritize active accounts.
notes: KEEP OPEN: The outlook-parity cluster added pollOutlookAccounts() to the sync daemon, which is related but distinct. The original scope is coordinating sync across multiple Gmail accounts with rate limiting and prioritization of active accounts. Outlook delta-polling is new scope (Outlook support), not a completion of the Gmail multi-account orchestration described here. Remains valid and open.
close_reason: Multi-account sync orchestration shipped (PR #88): bounded-concurrency rate limiting + active-account prioritization in src/sync/sync-orchestrator.ts; also fixed Gmail daemon token-drift + poll reentrancy. 7 tests.

title: S6.4: Thread size counting in rules
description: Complete thread size counting in rules engine (engine.ts:54)
close_reason: Commit 7b1c925 (outlook-parity cluster): the THREAD_SIZE rule condition was hardcoded to 1, making every thread-size rule a no-op. Fixed by adding getThreadSize() wired into the rule engine and email-storage. The bead description says 'engine.ts:54' — that TODO is now resolved. Evidence: commit 7b1c925, src/rules/engine.ts, src/storage/services/email-storage.ts.

title: S3.3: Semantic Search
description: Natural language email search using embeddings. 'Find emails about the contract from last week' instead of keyword matching.

title: S3.2: Smart Draft Generation
description: AI drafts email replies based on context. Learns from user's writing style. Supports tone adjustment (formal/casual/brief).

title: S3.1: Email Summarization
description: AI-powered email and thread summarization. Support single email, thread, and daily digest summaries. Works across all surfaces (CLI, Discord, Web).

title: E3: AI-Powered Features
description: Leverage multi-provider AI (Groq/Cerebras/Vertex/OpenAI/Anthropic/Ollama) for intelligent email operations. Summarization, draft generation, semantic search, and automated triage.

title: S2.7: Notification System
description: Real-time email notifications via Discord DM or channel. Configurable filters (sender, subject, labels). Interactive notification actions.

title: S2.6: Search Command (/search)
description: Implement /search command with semantic search using AI providers. Display results as selectable embed list.

title: S2.5: Compose Command (/compose)
description: Implement /compose command with Discord modal for email composition. Support To, Subject, Body fields with send confirmation.

title: S2.4: Read Command (/read)
description: Implement /read command to display full email content in Discord embed with reply/forward/archive action buttons.

title: S1.3: State Management Bridge
description: Create unified state management that works across all surfaces - terminal useState, Discord interactions, and web React state.

title: S4.4: Web Compose/Reply
description: Rich text email composer for web. Attachment support. Draft auto-save. AI assist integration.

title: S4.3: Responsive Inbox UI
description: Mobile-first responsive inbox design. Three-pane layout (folders, list, detail) on desktop. Single-pane mobile navigation.

title: S4.2: OAuth Web Flow
description: Browser-based OAuth for Gmail/Outlook. Secure token handling. Session management with refresh.

title: S4.1: React Web App Scaffold
description: Set up Vite + React + TypeScript web app. Configure routing, build pipeline, and deployment (Vercel/Cloudflare).

title: E4: Web Dashboard
description: React web application for browser-based email access. Full email client with OAuth login, responsive design, and shared component architecture with CLI/Discord.

title: S3.5: Smart Compose Suggestions
description: Real-time AI suggestions while composing. Subject line generation. Recipient suggestions based on context.

title: S3.4: Inbox Triage
description: AI categorizes and prioritizes inbox. Suggests actions (urgent, can wait, newsletter, spam). Auto-apply labels based on AI classification.

title: S5.4: Team Analytics
description: Response time metrics. Email volume by team member. SLA tracking. Dashboard in Discord and Web.

title: S5.3: Thread Comments
description: Internal team comments on email threads (not sent to external recipients). Discord thread per email for discussion.

title: S5.2: Email Assignment
description: Assign emails to team members via Discord reactions or commands. Track assignment status. Due date reminders.

title: S5.1: Shared Inbox Channels
description: Discord channels linked to shared email inboxes. Team members see same email stream. Real-time sync across viewers.

title: E5: Team Collaboration
description: Shared inbox and team email management. Assignment, comments, and workflow automation for team email handling.

title: S4.5: PWA Support
description: Progressive Web App features. Offline support with service worker. Push notifications. Install to home screen.
